name: Archery Clash!
core_loop: Engage in turn-based weapon duels, earn rewards, and collect/upgrade gear to progress through increasingly difficult levels.
audience_proxy: Young adult males interested in competitive PvP, weapon upgrades, and stylized female characters.
visual_style: 3D stylized with vibrant colors, slightly cartoonish character models, and realistic lighting.

palette.description: Bright blue banners with vibrant yellow text and colorful item rarity backgrounds.
